title: Understand TypedArray & DataView Internals
description: Describe the internal structure and memory representation of TypedArray objects. Utilize DataView for efficient, byte-level manipulation of binary data. Implement high-frequency numerical and binary operations using TypedArray and DataView to bypass standard JavaScript object overhead.
objectives: Describe the internal structure and memory representation of TypedArray objects.
Utilize DataView for efficient, byte-level manipulation of binary data.
Implement high-frequency numerical and binary operations using TypedArray and DataView to bypass standard JavaScript object overhead.
